# Lakeside Ink & Threadz

> Custom embroidery, DTF (direct-to-film) printing, business branding, logo design, and promotional items in Onalaska, TX. Serving Lake Livingston, Livingston, Coldspring, Huntsville, Cleveland, Splendora, Lufkin, and the surrounding East Texas area.

## Quick facts

- **Name:** Lakeside Ink & Threadz (also "L.I.T.")
- **Phone:** (346) 988-5449 — call or text
- **Email:** hello@lakesidethreadz.com
- **Location:** Onalaska, Texas 77360
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 9am–7pm · Sat by appointment · Sun closed
- **Turnaround:** typical orders ship in 5–10 business days; rush available at +25%
- **Minimums:** none — single-piece orders welcome, with volume discounts starting at 12 pieces
- **What we do:** embroidery on hats / polos / work shirts / uniforms / bags / patches; DTF printing for full-color shirt designs; logo design and digitizing; branded merch for businesses, teams, churches, weddings, and events

- [Contact](https://lakesidethreadz.com/contact) — address, hours, phone, contact form
- [Gallery](https://lakesidethreadz.com/gallery) — work samples

## Service areas (dedicated city pages)

Onalaska TX · Livingston TX · Lake Livingston · Coldspring TX · Huntsville TX · Cleveland TX · Splendora TX · Lufkin TX

## How pricing works

Pricing depends on product type, quantity (volume discounts: 8% at 12pcs, 14% at 24, 20% at 48, 25% at 100+), placement count, and optional add-ons (individual names +$3/pc, rush +25%, logo design +$149). A one-time embroidery digitizing fee of $45 covers logo setup. The instant calculator at /quote gives a precise estimate in under a minute.

## How to order

1. Get an instant estimate at [/quote](https://lakesidethreadz.com/quote), or describe your project on [/contact](https://lakesidethreadz.com/contact).
2. We confirm details and send a digital proof for approval (free, no commitment).
3. After proof approval, production starts; typical turnaround 5–10 business days.
4. Pickup in Onalaska or local delivery available.
